ground_truth.author_rationale: Four residue erasures: an unexplained channel cause, an unmeasured station-B depth, an unknown basal-ice age, and an unconcludable acceleration are each presented as resolved (a geothermal cause, 210 m, ~1,200 years, 'clearly accelerating').
